case_title: ECLIPSE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. LEOPOLD J RECINOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECLIPSE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED DEC-04-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
